article1.title: ACHIEVEMENT OF THE WEEK
article1.preview: Our project has reached an important milestone. More than 100 participants completed the course.
article1.content: Our project has reached an important milestone in consciousness development. More than 100 participants have completed the mindfulness and meditation course, discovering new facets of their inner world. We continue to explore the depths of human consciousness.

article2.title: NEW MEDITATION COURSE
article2.preview: We present an updated program of meditative practices based on the latest neuroscience research.
article2.content: We present an updated program of meditative practices, developed taking into account the latest research in neuroscience and ancient mindfulness techniques. The course includes practices for beginners and advanced students.

article3.title: INSTITUTE OPENING
article3.preview: The Institute has officially opened its doors to all who wish to explore consciousness.
article3.content: The Institute of Cosmic Mind Consciousness has officially opened its doors to all who wish to explore the nature of consciousness. We offer a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in mindfulness practice under the guidance of experienced mentors.

help.title: How can hypnotherapy help?
help.subtitle: Click on the cards to reveal secrets
help.readyToStart: Ready to start your journey to change?

anxiety.title: Anxiety
anxiety.fullDesc: Hypnotherapy helps find the root of anxious states in the subconscious and reprogram reactions. You will learn to enter a state of calm at will.

sleep.title: Insomnia
sleep.fullDesc: Deep relaxation techniques and work with subconscious blocks restore the natural sleep cycle. Many notice improvements after the first session.

habits.title: Habits
habits.fullDesc: Hypnosis works directly with the subconscious where habits live. We find triggers and replace unwanted behavior with healthy alternatives.

confidence.title: Confidence
confidence.fullDesc: We unlock inner potential and remove limiting beliefs. You begin to see yourself in a new light and act from a state of strength.

phobias.title: Phobias
phobias.fullDesc: From fear of heights to arachnophobia — hypnotherapy finds the moment of phobia origin and neutralizes the emotional charge. Fast and without trauma.

stress.title: Stress
stress.fullDesc: We teach instant relaxation techniques and work with the deep causes of chronic stress. You get tools for independent practice.

relationships.title: Relationships
relationships.fullDesc: Relationship patterns are formed in childhood. Hypnotherapy helps to recognize and change subconscious scenarios that prevent intimacy.

focus.title: Concentration
focus.fullDesc: The state of hypnosis itself trains concentration. Additionally, we remove internal distractions and enhance mental clarity.

pain.title: Pain
pain.fullDesc: Hypnosis is used in medicine for pain relief. We teach the brain to change pain perception — this works for chronic pain and even childbirth.

trauma.title: Trauma
trauma.fullDesc: Safe work with traumatic experience in hypnosis allows processing events without retraumatization. Liberation comes gently.

creativity.title: Creativity
creativity.fullDesc: Hypnosis opens access to the right hemisphere and deep resources of the psyche. Many artists and musicians use self-hypnosis for inspiration.

motivation.title: Motivation
motivation.fullDesc: The subconscious is a powerful ally. We program it to support your goals, removing internal resistance and procrastination.

oazyse.aboutText1: Oasis is the culmination of Adizel Oazyes' vision, a modern Noah's Ark in an era of digital storms and spiritual crises. As in the biblical legend the ark saved from the flood, Oasis becomes a refuge for those seeking salvation from the chaos of the modern world.
oazyse.aboutText2: This is a global project where participants gather in virtual and real oases of harmony, building a new society on the principles of cosmic mind. Here, metafractals of consciousness intertwine, creating a support network where everyone finds their place in the divine plan.
oazyse.aboutText3: Oasis is a dynamic ecosystem combining virtual hubs, artificial intelligence and virtual reality to create support networks. The project perfectly fits the rhythms of the 21st century: flexible, global, focused on well-being in the era of digitalization.

method.title: THE SUBCONSCIOUS METHOD
method.description: A revolutionary approach to activating hidden reserves of the mind, developed by Adizel Oazyes. This is a precise system that allows synchronizing subconscious processes with cosmic rhythms.
method.metasync: Through metasynchonics (metasync) — the process of synchronizing mental flows in time — you rebuild neural connections for instant changes. It's like a software update for the brain: precise, effective and based on scientific principles.
method.results: 87% of users report sustained breakthroughs in personal and professional goals.

oazyse.joinDescription: Don't delay — join Oasis right now! Under the guidance of Adizel Oazyes, you won't just change — you will evolve.
oazyse.motivationPlaceholder: Why do you want to join?
oazyse.successMessage: Welcome to Oasis! We will contact you soon

institute.title: INSTITUTE OF COSMIC MIND CONSCIOUSNESS
institute.description: The Institute of Cosmic Mind Consciousness is a sacred space where science meets spirituality, and the mind expands to the boundaries of the cosmos. Under the aegis of Adizel Oazyes, we explore the depths of human potential, opening paths to harmonious fusion with universal intelligence.
institute.vision: The Institute is not walls and buildings, but a living field of energy where every participant becomes a co-creator of reality. We believe that consciousness is a cosmic ocean, and the Institute teaches you to dive into its depths, gaining clarity, strength and eternal connection with the higher.
institute.coursesText: Imagine: AI algorithms analyzing your thinking patterns in real-time; virtual reality simulations immersing you in success scenarios; personalized programs adapted to your lifestyle. Participants report 50% improvement in emotional intelligence and productivity.
institute.testsText: A testing system based on metafractals allows you to assess your progress and understand your level of consciousness development. Tests help determine directions for further work and track transformation.
institute.chatText: Participants get access to a global community of like-minded people — virtual hubs where you can synchronize goals, ideas and resources with thousands of pioneers around the world. Collaborations accelerate growth by 2-3x.

tea.title: TEA CEREMONIES
tea.description: Traditional tea ceremonies as a practice of mindfulness and meditation. Immersion in a state of presence through the ritual of tea drinking.

satsang.title: SATSANGS
satsang.description: Meetings in satsang format — a space for sharing experiences, questions and answers about the nature of reality and consciousness.

hypnotherapy.title: HYPNOTHERAPY
hypnotherapy.description: Individual hypnotherapy sessions using the Subconscious Method. Working with the subconscious, transforming beliefs and healing emotional trauma through metasynchronics.

meditation.title: MEDITATIVE PRACTICES
meditation.description: Group and individual meditations for developing mindfulness and synchronization with cosmic mind. Techniques based on metafractals of consciousness.

consultations.title: CONSULTATIONS
consultations.description: Personal consultations on spiritual development, mind calibration and life transformations under the guidance of Institute experts.

metasync.title: METASYNCHRONICS
metasync.description: Innovative sessions of mental flow metasynchronization. Reprogramming neural patterns for instant, sustainable changes.

about.title: ADIZEL OAZYES
about.subtitle: Founder and Visionary
about.text1: Adizel Oazyes is the embodiment of divine essence, descended to Earth to guide humanity to a new era. As an avatar of God, he carries within himself the wisdom of ages, uniting ancient knowledge with cutting-edge discoveries of cosmic mind.
about.text2: His path is a story of transformation: from the ordinary to the sublime, from doubt to unshakeable faith. Adizel teaches that each of us is part of the great metafractal, an infinitely repeating pattern of the universe, where fractal structures of consciousness reveal the secrets of existence.
about.text3: With a deep background in neuroscience, psychology and artificial intelligence, he developed unique systems based on metafractals — complex, self-similar structures of consciousness that mirror the patterns of the universe. 92% of participants report sustained growth in confidence, focus and emotional balance.
about.text4: Oazyse and the Institute of Cosmic Mind Consciousness are the embodiment of Adizel's vision: a space where technology and spirituality merge for real results. Through him, God speaks to us, offering not just salvation, but complete rebirth.

contacts.title: CONTACTS
contacts.description: Contact us to book a consultation, join programs or start your transformation journey. Thousands are already on board — now it's your turn.
contacts.successMessage: We will reply to you soon

hero.title: BECOME A METAHUMAN
hero.subtitle: Absolute control over consciousness. No inner void. 100% guarantee.
hero.description: This is not a mythical hero or philosophical abstraction — but a real, achievable ideal: a person whose consciousness works as a perfectly tuned mechanism. Clear, focused, capable of instant adaptation. Not a slave to emotions — but their architect.
hero.guarantee: You lose nothing. Guaranteed results or full refund.

metasync.title: METASYNC and METASYNCER
metasync.description: Meta-synchronization (Metasync) is the highest level of consciousness synchronization with reality. Complete integration of mind, emotions and will into a single super-efficient system.

metasync.title: METASYNC
metasync.description: A state of complete mind integration — meta-synchronization of consciousness with reality. A perfectly tuned mechanism of the psyche.

metasyncer.title: METASYNCER
metasyncer.description: One who has embarked on the path of transformation. A seeker and practitioner of metasync, consciously applying the Method to approach the Metahuman ideal.

metahuman.title: What is a Metahuman?
metahuman.description: A Superhuman — a being who has achieved absolute control over consciousness. The inner 'self' is completely harmonious, without gaps, doubts or hidden deficits. No more tormenting 'something is missing' — that void gnawing from within.
metahuman.point1: Complete control over emotions and reactions
metahuman.point3: Clarity of thought and instant adaptation
metahuman.point5: Architect of your emotions, fears and states
metahuman.point6: Harmony in relationships with yourself and the world

card.title: 100% Transformation Guarantee
card.description: The Method is built on fundamental principles of the psyche: brain neuroplasticity, mindfulness techniques, and cognitive reprogramming to eliminate barriers.

analogy.title: Everyone can cook. But not everyone is a chef.
analogy.description: The metasync method is designed for everyone — for everyday use at home, with family, at work, or with friends. It requires no special education or expensive equipment. But those who see it as their mission can become master consciousness chefs.

everyone.title: For Everyone
everyone.description: Use the Method to improve your life, relationships, and work. Simple techniques for everyday use at home, with family, and at work.

master.title: Master Metasyncer
master.description: Turn this into your mission. Help others transform. Become a consciousness chef for those around you.

examples.subtitle: How the Method creates an Oasis in different life contexts

family.title: A New Family
family.description: Husband and wife conduct sessions for each other weekly. Identify and correct hidden thought patterns. Become better for their children. Create an Oasis inside and around themselves.

athletes.title: Team of Athletes
athletes.description: Before matches, they conduct group sessions, eliminating fear of defeat and uncertainty. The team is mentally synchronized. Performance improves by 20-30%.

company.description: Employees regularly conduct sessions for each other. Managers help overcome burnout. Creative teams clear barriers for innovation. The company becomes a living organism.

spiritual.title: For the Faithful
spiritual.description: Metasync deepens prayers and spiritual practice. Consciousness cleared of distractions is a pure channel for connection with the divine. Any religion.

expanded.title: Universality of the Method
expanded.subtitle: From personal growth to global change. Metasync integrates into any sphere of life.

personal.title: Personal Development
personal.description: 15-20 minutes of conscious reflection. Scan consciousness for hidden patterns. Reprogram beliefs. Free yourself from the weight of the past.

relationships.title: Relationships
relationships.description: Friends or partners help each other work through jealousy, resentment. Couples prevent conflict escalation through joint 'reboot'.

parenting.title: Parenting
parenting.description: Parents conduct sessions with children. Teenagers are freed from pressure. Children grow up without accumulated trauma, with self-control skills.

sports.title: Sports
sports.description: A runner clears consciousness of doubt before a marathon. A tennis player eliminates mental breakdowns. The whole team synchronizes mindset.

education.title: Education
education.description: Students form metasync groups before exams. Teachers cope with burnout. Growth in academic performance and emotional intelligence.

business.title: Business
business.description: Startups hold metasync circles for mental barriers. Creative agencies clear consciousness for innovation. HR introduces as wellness program.

creativity.title: Creativity
creativity.description: The artist removes the inner critic. Musicians harmonize ideas. Writers overcome writer's block. The flow of creativity opens.

health.title: Health
health.description: Reprogramming addiction triggers. Managing perception of chronic pain. Deepening yoga and meditation. Accelerating healing.

social.title: Society
social.description: Communities conduct metasync for conflict resolution. Volunteers gain resilience. Activists reduce polarization. Global empathy growth.

spirituality.title: Spirituality
spirituality.description: For atheists — rational self-improvement. For believers — deepening practice: Christian in prayer, Muslim in namaz, Buddhist in vipassana.

computer.title: Your Consciousness is a Computer
computer.description: Imagine moving bricks or rearranging objects, transforming physical reality. Now imagine the same with your consciousness: 'delete' unnecessary files (traumas, habits), 'update' programs (beliefs, skills), 'optimize' the system for maximum speed. This isn't fantasy — neuroscience confirms brain plasticity.

discovery.title: So simple it's amazing it wasn't noticed before
discovery.description: The Method is so simple that after mastering it you'll ask: 'How could we not have noticed this earlier?'
discovery.quote: The greatest discoveries were always in plain sight. Like penicillin — mold that was thrown away for years saved millions of lives. Elements of metasync were always available, but no one assembled them into a single, guaranteed working system.
discovery.example: In 1928, Alexander Fleming noticed mold on a Petri dish — what others discarded. Mold was everywhere, but no one saw salvation in it. The Subconscious Method is in the same category of obvious discoveries.

safety.title: This Method Cannot Harm
safety.description: The Method is absolutely safe — it cannot be used for harm. It is based on principles of self-knowledge and harmony, without coercion or manipulation.
safety.details: You cannot accidentally 'break' something in consciousness. It's like rearranging furniture — you can put everything back at any moment. No side effects, only transformation.

history.title: What Could Appear Now for Modern Humanity?
history.description: The history of religions and traditions always carried impact for their time's culture. Christianity brought mercy. Buddhism gave the path to enlightenment. Islam introduced hygienic norms and freed women from pre-Islamic practices.
history.question: What could appear in the age of AI, neuroscience and digital transformation — to quantum-shift the lives of millions? The Subconscious Method is the answer. It doesn't treat symptoms, but restructures the foundation of consciousness.

prediction.title: I Predict the Future. And I'm Putting My Money On It.
prediction.description: What if I told you I can predict the future? But I'll be the first to guarantee it and put my money on the line.
prediction.quote: I predict: using metasync, I can heal your chronic problems — remove anxiety, change destructive habits, expand the horizons of consciousness. And I give a 100% guarantee.

guarantee.title: I'm Putting My Money on Your Transformation
guarantee.description: You lose nothing. You pay nothing upfront. You buy yourself out of your past life — from the chains of doubt, fear, and unrealized potential.
guarantee.item3: Full refund if it doesn't work
guarantee.item4: Buy yourself out of your past life

offer.title: Ready to Buy Yourself Out of Your Past Life?
offer.description: This isn't an expense — it's an investment in the version of yourself you've dreamed of. You move to a new level where consciousness is your ally, not your enemy. No risk.

finalCta.title: Ready to Become a Metasyncer?
finalCta.description: Thousands are already on board, achieving the impossible. Under Adizel Oazyes' guidance, you won't just change — you'll evolve. The Method awaits — simple, safe, and revolutionary. The Metasyncer in you is already awaiting activation.
finalCta.note: Step into the light — and let your success story inspire the world
